change: Created comprehensive navigation hub for 25 reference files. Organized by 5 workflows (Scripting, Data Analysis, Indexes, Extraction, Advanced). Added CSV schema legend, quick-start tasks, statistics.
Added 'Complete Reference Documentation' banner in Quick Navigation section. Links to reference/INDEX.md. Explains workflow organization.
Added entry-point link for new users: 'Start with INDEX.md for organized navigation by workflow and task.'
SQLite schema (250 LOC) with 3 tables, CRUD ops, indexed queries for O(log N) lookups on attrib_name and baseId.
Cache lifecycle manager (390+ LOC): L1 lookups (2-5ms), L2 fallback (20-100ms), dirty tracking, periodic sync every 50 resolutions.
Main Copilot Skill entry (450+ LOC): resolveBlueprint, resolveBatch (up to 100), getCacheStats/Metadata/reset, civilization validation.
Quick-start guide (324 LOC) covering installation, API reference, configuration, commands, troubleshooting.
Comprehensive technical guide (600+ LOC): architecture, cache patterns, API integration, performance tuning, troubleshooting.
Executive summary (400+ LOC) documenting design decisions, architecture rationale, performance characteristics, validation.
Implementation checklist (500+ LOC) with 8 sections covering Core, Cache, Error Handling, Integration, Testing, Deployment, Documentation.
PowerShell CLI (380 LOC) for cache management: -Status, -Check, -Reset, -Export, -Monitor, -PostExtract commands.
Node manifest with better-sqlite3, TypeScript/Jest dev deps, build and cache mgmt scripts. Engines: >=20.
TypeScript config: ES2020 target, CommonJS, esModuleInterop, strict mode, source maps, declaration files.
Metadata schema template tracking cache stats: init_date, last_flush, entries, breakdown, hit_rate, sync_interval.
npm configuration enforcing engine-strict to prevent builds on incompatible Node versions.
Added CacheMetadata properties: sync_interval_resolutions (default 50), last_stats_export. Updated DEFAULT_CACHE_METADATA.
Added re-exports for CacheEntry, CacheMetadata, CacheSchema. Added getBreakdownKey() type mapping helper (singular→plural).
Updated build script to use tsconfig.json. Engine constraint relaxed to >=20 (supports Node 20, 24, future LTS).
Completion status: Phase 1-3, build artifacts (3.6KB JS total), known limitations (better-sqlite3 native module), workarounds.
